english: comrade / fellow member (especially in a political party)
notes: Historically associated with socialist and communist movements. Also used in the SPD (German Social Democratic Party). The feminine form is 'Genossin', plural 'Genossinnen'.

sentences.german: Er sprach seine Parteifreunde als Genossen an.
sentences.english: He addressed his party friends as comrades.

sentences.german: Die Genossen diskutierten stundenlang über die neue Politik.
sentences.english: The comrades discussed the new policy for hours.
